data.title: Zillow launches 'Someday Starts Today' campaign for all stages of home journey, debuts Feb. 1 during Grammy Awards broadcast. #Zillow #RealEstate.
data.description: On February 1, a new nationwide campaign will launch in conjunction with Zillow's advertising during the Grammy Awards broadcast. With housing choices becoming increasingly challenging, whether it be purchasing, leasing, or strategizing for the future, Zillow is transforming its brand presence. This initiative aims to assist individuals in navigating the complex housing market landscape. The campaign will feature a variety of strategies geared towards aiding individuals in making informed decisions regarding their housing needs.

data.title: WeaveGrid's expansion lets utilities manage load growth reliably & affordably with new DISCO capabilities.
data.description: WeaveGrid, a prominent provider of grid orchestration software for electric utilities, unveiled new Distribution Integrated System Capacity Orchestration capabilities on Jan. 29, 2026. This launch enables utilities to effectively handle load growth while maintaining reliability and cost-effectiveness. This enhancement aims to support the increasing demand for energy by optimizing system operations. This innovation marks a significant advancement in the industry and is expected to benefit utilities experiencing growth challenges.

data.title: Dow's Q4 2025 results show $9.5B net sales, down 9% YoY and 5% sequentially reflecting declines in all segments.
data.description: In Midland, Michigan on January 29, 2026, Dow (NYSE: DOW) reported financial highlights indicating net sales of $9.5 billion, showing a 9% decrease compared to the previous year. This decline was seen across all operating segments. Sequentially, net sales dropped by 5%, primarily driven by lower local prices and volumes due to regular seasonal fluctuations.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical to host conference call for Q4 and full-year 2025 results, announced on Jan 29, 2026. NYSE: WST's global leader in injectable drug solutions.
data.description: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a prominent company specializing in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before the market opens on a specific date. This announcement was made in Exton, Pennsylvania, on Jan. 29, 2026. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WST, and is known for its global leadership in the sector. Investors and stakeholders are anticipated to closely monitor the figures revealed in this upcoming report for insights into the company's performance and trajectory.

data.title: XPRIZE Wildfire announces $750,000 awarded to finalist teams in $11M competition for autonomous wildfire response solutions.
data.description: A total of $750,000 has been granted to various autonomous teams to enhance their advancements in drone technology and artificial intelligence coordination. This initiative was announced in Oakland, California on January 29, 2026 by XPRIZE, a renowned organization known for creating and managing high-stakes incentive contests geared towards addressing significant global issues. The funding aims to drive innovative solutions in the integration of drones and AI, supporting the ongoing efforts of participating teams.

data.title: Honeywell reports Q4 2025 results with sales of $9.8B, up 6%, and adjusted EPS of $2.59. Orders up 23%, backlog over $37B.
data.description: Sales in the fourth quarter reached $9.8 billion, showing a 6% increase, while adjusted sales were reported at $10.1 billion, reflecting a 10% boost, with an 11% rise organically. Fourth-quarter GAAP Earnings Per Share stood at $0.49 and adjusted EPS at $2.59. Orders in the same quarter surged by 23% organically, contributing to a backlog exceeding $37 billion. data.title: Dow launches Transform to Outperform for $2 billion Op. EBITDA improvement, streamlining processes, targeting growth.
data.description: With a focused goal of achieving a minimum of $2 billion in operational EBITDA enhancement in the near future, efforts are underway to significantly simplify the Company's operational framework, streamline processes, reduce costs, and modernize customer service delivery. The anticipated benefits from these actions are projected to contribute positively to earnings levels by 2025 and align with Dow's previous strategies.

data.title: EVA Live debuts on Nasdaq with GOAI, drawing strong attention for its A.I. technology in a $500B ad industry.
data.description: Los Angeles-based EVA Live, Inc. (referred to as "EVA" or the "Company"), commenced trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market with the ticker symbol GOAI on January 29, 2026. The debut received notable focus from both the market and media, showcasing an increased interest in the company's performance and growth potential.

data.title: Hong Kong plans to release HK$1.5B in infrastructure bonds linked to HONIA. Tender on Feb 4 by HKMA to raise funds for projects.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has revealed a tender scheduled for February 4 for floating rate notes linked to the overnight index average. The funds raised from this issuance will go towards infrastructure projects in the region. This initiative aims to support the development of crucial infrastructure and stimulate economic growth. This move by the HKMA signifies a commitment to investing in vital projects to bolster the economy.

data.title: SAP stock fell as CFO acknowledges Cloud slowdown worse than expected with revenue rising to 9.68 billion euros.
data.description: German software giant SAP SE's stock dropped after reporting mixed fourth-quarter fiscal 2025 results. Revenue grew 3% YoY to 9.68 billion euros, with non-IFRS EPS up 16% YoY to 1.62 euros. Quarterly earnings in USD were $1.89 per share, beating estimates, while revenue at $11.27 billion missed expectations of $11.46 billion. IFRS operating profit rose 27% YoY, non-IFRS operating profit increased 16% YoY, and operating cash flow was at 1.30 billion euros, with free cash flow at 1.03 billion euros. The cloud backlog was at 21.05 billion euros, up 16% YoY, and up 25% YoY in constant currencies, impacted by transformational deals and termination clauses. SAP CFO mentioned a sharper slowdown than expected.

data.title: SunCoke Energy (NYSE: SXC) to announce Q4 2025 earnings and 2026 guidance on Feb 17, 2026, at 11:00 am ET. Live webcast available.
data.description: SunCoke Energy, Inc. (SXC) intends to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and provide guidance for 2026 on February 17, 2026. This information will be disclosed before the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will conduct its quarterly earnings call at 11:00 am ET on the same day. For those interested, the conference call can be accessed live at the following link: https://event.choruscall.com/mediaframe/webcast.html?webcastid=6AQEfKx3 and will be available for replay on the Investors section of the SunCoke Energy website, www.suncoke.com.
